Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

American Planning Association records, 1925-2015.
Collection Number: 4075

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
American Planning Association records, 1925-2015.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
4075
Abstract:
Contains office files and printed materials relating to planning conferences and programs; National Planning Awards submissions; and materials regarding planning education. Also includes minutes, newsletters, conference records, planning publications from various institutional entities now part of APA, proceedings from meetings, and audiotapes of lectures.
Creator:
American Planning Association
Quanitities:
153.3 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY

In 1978, the American Society of Planning Officials (ASPO) merged with the American Institute of Planners (AIP) to form the American Planning Association (APA).
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Office files and printed materials relating to planning conferences and programs; National Planning Awards submissions; and materials regarding planning education. Correspondence, reports, news releases, speeches, statements, biographies, mailing lists, photographs, programs, printed materials, applications, and files pertaining to conferences and programs of the American Planning Association; included are files of Stephen L. Cochran (1980-84) and Israel Stollman; news releases, speeches, articles, an interview, and newsletters concerning the Urban Enterprise Zone Conference of APA's Washington, DC, Chapter (1981); reports, mailing lists, and publicity materials regarding the Dallas National Planning Conference (1982); applications from universities with planning programs for recognition by the APA National Education Development Committee (1979-84); and National Planning Awards submissions (1985 and 1987). Also, films and microfilms, and Dennis O'Harrow speeches and material.
Includes minutes, newsletters, conference records, numerous planning publications from various institutional entities now part of APA, proceedings from meetings, audiotapes of lectures, and other records and publications.
RELATED MATERIAL

See also: Guide to the American Society of Planning Officials Records ( collection #3247) and the Guide to the American Institute of Planners Records ( collection #4007).
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

American Planning Association Records, #4075. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
SUBJECTS

Names:
Cochran, Stephen L.
Stollman, Israel.
O\'Harrow, Dennis, 1908-
American Planning Association. National Education Development Committee

American Planning Association. Urban Enterprise Zone Conference (Location of meeting: Washington, D.C.). Date of meeting or treaty signing: (1981 :.)
Dallas National Planning Conference (Date of meeting or treaty signing: (1982).)
Subjects:
Zoning.
Regional planning.
City planning.
